Video.summary: Did you know Pit Bulls are not a breed of dog? Rather, they are a variety of breeds.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pit Bulls

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Pit Bulls
TPC That's My Pet | Pit Bulls
TPC That's My Pet | Pit Bulls

Video.summary: Did you know that Golden Retrievers are the third most popular dog breed in America?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Golden Retrievers

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Golden Retrievers
TPC That's My Pet | Golden Retrievers
TPC That's My Pet | Golden Retrievers

Video.summary: Did you know a domesticated Raccoon can live up to twenty years?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Raccoons

Video.summary: Did you know that it is much more practical to potty trian a parrot than a dog?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Parrots

Video.summary: Did you know Dachshunds were bred to hunt badgers?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Dachshunds

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 350+ different parrot species… far more than we could fit into this episode.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Birds

Video.summary: Did you know that ferrets are used to run wires for houses and buildings?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Ferret

Video.summary: Did you know that Llamas were first domesticated 5,000 years ago in Peru?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals
TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals
TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals

Video.summary: Did you know Chihuahuas weigh an average of 2 to 6 pounds!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Chihuahuas

Video.summary: Did you know a group of Pugs is called a “grumbling”
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pugs

Video.summary: Did you know that Pigs can trot up to 11 miles per hour ?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pigs

Video.summary: Did you know that Yorkies originated in England about 200 years ago?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Terriers

Video.summary: Golden Retrievers, Huskies, Pit Bulls and more! All of your favorite dog breeds are unscripted!
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | All Breeds, No Script

Animals Unscripted | All Breeds, No Script
Animals Unscripted | All Breeds, No Script

Video.summary: We're giving you the bird over and over again and you're going to sit there and take it.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Flippin' the Bird

Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Scavengers

Video.summary: When you're a cat, everyday is Caturday.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Caturday

Video.summary: The smallest of our fur friends are running the show...kittens and puppies!
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Kittens & Puppies!

Video.summary: You know what really grinds my gears? Not getting enough funny pet clips.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Pet Peeves

Video.summary: Cats are a never-ending source of hilarious clips. Unfortunately, this episode can only last 30 minutes.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Cool Cats

Video.summary: Dogs with mad hops and other interesting "skills."
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Air Bud

Video.summary: From the land, sky, and sea: these wild friends have personality and they aren't afraid to show it!
